scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,web,wsl -c cyan,yellow,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @cadsploy/api" "npm run dev -w @cadsploy/worker" "npm run dev -w @cadsploy/web" "wsl sleep infinity"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cadsploy/api && npm run build -w @cadsploy/worker && npm run build -w @cadsploy/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cadsploy/api && npm run typecheck -w @cadsploy/worker && npm run typecheck -w @cadsploy/web
